response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring an introduction by VTubers Fuwawa and Mococo for the "hololive BASE on Tour! 2026" collaboration, followed by promotional materials for the "hololive English 4th Concert Serendipity". The video contains background instrumental music but no vocal songs.
